data.flavor_text: "She has been chosen." —King Kashekim Nedakh

abilities.name: Good As New
abilities.text: {Exert} — Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put each character card with cost 2 or less into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if you have 4 or more other characters in play, your other characters get +1 {Lore} this turn.

keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 3 to sing songs.)

abilities.text: Whenever you play a character with Bodyguard, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text: Her musical talents are off the charts!

keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 4 to sing songs.)

data.flavor_text:
"Our society has never failed to answer a call for
help."
—Mr. Chairman

data.name: Mr. Snoops
data.flavor_text:
"This is simple, Snoops! I want that lore! The one
that shines like a diamond!"
—Madame Medusa

data.name: Nani

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text: "Let me handle this, Lilo."

data.name: Orville
data.flavor_text:
"Boy, look at those things go! Whaddaya call 'em?
Inkrunners? I wish I could fly like that."

abilities.name: Bark
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets -2 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text: Just like Thunderbolt, he'll stand up to any bad guy.

data.name: Perdita

abilities.name: Come Along, Children
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever she quests, you may play a character with cost 2 or less from your discard for free.

data.flavor_text: Her pups will follow her anywhere.

data.name: Piglet

abilities.name: And I'm the Captain!
abilities.text: While you have 2 or more other characters in play, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"Ahoy! There's lore out there, and I'm g-gonna
find it!"

keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Pluto.)

keywords.name: Bodyguard

data.name: Pluto

abilities.name: Good Dog
abilities.text: {Exert} — You pay 1 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn.

data.flavor_text: He just can't wait for new friends to arrive!

data.name: Pongo

abilities.name: Twilight Bark
abilities.text: {Exert} — Once per turn, you may pay 2 {Ink} to reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a character card, put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text: "We'll find our way. I know we will!"

data.name: Queen of Hearts

abilities.name: All Ways Here Are My Ways
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, your other Villain characters get +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
The more of the Inklands she claims, the more
she wants.

data.name: Rolly

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: "I'm hungry, Mother. I really am."

data.name: Tinker Bell

abilities.name: Make a New Friend
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.flavor_text: Plenty of berries—and friendship—to go around.

data.name: Wendy Darling
data.flavor_text:
With Tink's upgrades in place, Wendy took them to
the skies to find the missing mermaid.

data.name: 99 Puppies
rules: Whenever one of your characters quests this turn, gain 1 lore.
data.flavor_text:
"Two, four, six, and three is nine, plus two is 11..."
—Roger

data.name: Boss's Orders
rules: Chosen character gains Support this turn. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)
data.flavor_text:
"Snoops! I know you can look harder! Find me that lore!"
—Madame Medusa

data.name: Heal What Has Been Hurt
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Remove up to 3 damage from chosen character. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
Let your power shine
Make the clock reverse...

data.name: Quick Patch
rules: Remove up to 3 damage from chosen location.
data.flavor_text: "Good as new! Well, almost."

data.name: The Bare Necessities
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a non-character card of your choice.
data.flavor_text: Forget about your worries and your strife....

data.name: Cleansing Rainwater

abilities.name: Ancient Power
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 2 damage from each of your characters.

data.flavor_text: Rainwater lands as stone melts and dragons fly again.

data.name: Heart of Atlantis

abilities.name: Life Giver
abilities.text: {Exert} — You pay 2 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"It's what's keeping you—all of Atlantis—alive!"
—Milo Thatch

data.name: Wildcat's Wrench

abilities.name: Rebuild
abilities.text: {Exert} — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen location.

data.flavor_text: The right tool makes all the difference.

data.name: Never Land
data.flavor_text:
The mermaids told Peter they'd seen some items floating by several days earlier,
but they were more concerned that one of their sisters had gone missing.

abilities.name: We Are All Connected
abilities.text: Characters get +2 ⛉ while here.

abilities.name: Lion Home
abilities.text: If you have a Prince or King character here, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play characters.

data.name: Tiana's Palace

abilities.name: Night Out
abilities.text: Characters can't be challenged while here.

data.flavor_text: In New Orleans, dreams can come true.

data.name: Alice

abilities.name: Curiouser and Curiouser
abilities.text: {Exert} — Exert chosen opposing character and all other opposing characters with the same name.

data.flavor_text:
With the right tea leaves and a little magic, she
creates the perfect cup for any party guest.

data.name: Chernabog's Followers

abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may banish them to draw a card.

data.flavor_text: Let chaos reign.

data.name: Diablo

abilities.name: Looking For Aurora
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character named Maleficent, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text:
With a little ink-enhanced magic, nothing escapes
his sight.

data.name: Genie

abilities.name: Three Wishes
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may shuffle this card into your deck to draw 3 cards.

data.flavor_text:
"Right here, direct from the lamp, right here for
your very much wish fulfillment."

abilities.text: {Exert} — Exert chosen character.

data.flavor_text: "Freeze Zeus!"

animals."

"Carpet and I can swoop in, grab the lore, and be back
before anyone knows it!" —Aladdin

keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Magica De Spell.)

data.flavor_text:
"I can feel my powers growing the closer I get to
Scrooge's precious dime!"

abilities.name: Telekinesis
abilities.text: {Exert} — Return chosen item with cost equal to or less than this character's {Strength} to its player's hand.

data.flavor_text: "Do you know what I call this? A good start!"

abilities.name: Dark Knowledge
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may draw a card.

abilities.name: Divination
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever you draw a card, you may move 1 damage counter from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.name: Mama Odie

abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may move up to 2 damage counters from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text: "That's the way to give it what it needs, Juju!"

abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may shuffle this card into your deck.

data.flavor_text: Always ready to lend a hand...er, snout.

keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +3 {Strength}.)

abilities.name: Ancient Skills
abilities.text: Whenever he challenges a Hyena character, this character takes no damage from the challenge.

data.flavor_text: Mind the stick!

data.name: Stratos

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.text: {Exert} — Gain lore equal to the number of Titan characters you have in play.

data.flavor_text: "Blow Zeus away!"

data.name: The Firebird
data.flavor_text:
It rages through the forest,
Wings spread wide with flame
Spring sings its ancient chorus
And green renews its claim

data.name: The Queen
data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
data.flavor_text:
"A cobweb's strand to hold her fast
An eagle's eye to see her well
Sands of time to steal her past
Thus I cast my magic spell!"

data.name: Treasure Guardian

abilities.name: Who Disturbs My Slumber?
abilities.text: This character can't challenge or quest unless it is at a location.

data.flavor_text: "Only one may enter here."

data.name: Ursula

abilities.name: You're Too Late
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character can't ready at the start of their next turn.

data.flavor_text: The secret contract has already been written.

data.name: Bestow a Gift
rules: Move 1 damage counter from chosen character to chosen opposing character.
data.flavor_text:
"From magic ink I call this gift.
Fly my minion, thy wings be swift!"
—Maleficent

data.name: It Calls Me
rules: (A character with cost 1 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Draw a card. Then, choose up to 3 cards from chosen opponent's discard and shuffle them into their deck.
data.flavor_text: I am everything I've learned and more

data.name: Last-Ditch Effort
rules: Exert chosen opposing character. Then chosen character of yours gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)
data.flavor_text: "I got your back."

data.name: The Boss is on a Roll
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Put any number of them on the top or the bottom of your deck in any order. Gain 1 lore.
data.flavor_text: Go ahead! Make your choice!

abilities.name: Good or Evil
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you have a character named Jafar in play, draw 2 cards. If you have a character named Genie in play, return chosen character with cost 4 or less to their player's hand.

data.name: The Sorcerer's Hat

abilities.name: Incredible Energy
abilities.text: {Exert} — Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put that card into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the top of your deck.

data.flavor_text:
Minnie approached it cautiously. Whoever had placed it here
might have prepared traps.

data.name: Forbidden Mountain
data.flavor_text:
An eerie quiet surrounds the castle—but beware of the dangerous
occupant within.

data.name: The Queen's Castle

abilities.name: Using the Mirror
abilities.text: At the start of your turn, for each character you have here, you may draw a card.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
data.flavor_text: Those who visit the mirror can choose their question—but not the answer.

data.name: The Sorcerer's Tower

abilities.name: Broom Closet
abilities.text: Your characters named Magic Broom may move here for free.

abilities.name: Magical Power
abilities.text: Characters get +1 {Lore} while here.

data.flavor_text: Everything you need to make some magic.

data.name: Cubby

abilities.name: The Bear
abilities.text: Whenever this character moves to a location, he gets +3 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
With Peter holding off Hook, Cubby did what he
does best: break stuff.

data.name: Cursed Merfolk

abilities.name: Poor Souls
abilities.text: Whenever this character is challenged, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

data.flavor_text:
"Now it's happened once or twice, someone couldn't
pay the price..."
—Ursula

data.name: Don Karnage

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
"You didn't expect to find me here, did you? Well
neither did I."

data.name: Flotsam

abilities.name: Eerie Pair
abilities.text: Your characters named Jetsam get +3 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text: "Ursula needs lore to complete her plan...."

data.name: Friar Tuck

abilities.name: You Thieving Scoundrel
abilities.text: When you play this character, the player or players with the most cards in their hand chooses and discards a card.

data.flavor_text: "Get outta my church! Out! Out! Out!"

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Helga Sinclair.)

abilities.name: This Changes Everything
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may deal 3 damage to chosen damaged character.

data.name: Helga Sinclair

abilities.name: Nothing Personal
abilities.text: When this character is challenged and banished, banish the challenging character.

data.flavor_text: "You said we were in this together!"

data.name: Jetsam

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Eerie Pair
abilities.text: Your characters named Flotsam gain Ward.

data.flavor_text: "There must be powerful lore here, very powerful."

data.name: Kit Cloudkicker

abilities.name: Skysurfing
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may return chosen opposing character with 2 {Strength} or less to their player's hand.

data.flavor_text:
"It's been fun, guys, but I got to be going.
Yahoooo!"

abilities.name: Well, Now You Know
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gains Reckless during their next turn. (They can't quest and must challenge if able.)

abilities.name: Thanks For Volunteering
abilities.text: Whenever one of your other characters is banished, each opponent loses 1 lore.

data.name: Milo Thatch
data.flavor_text:
"Believe me, studying gibberish really can take
you places!"

data.name: Milo Thatch

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Milo Thatch.)

abilities.name: Take Them by Surprise
abilities.text: When this character is banished, return all opposing characters to their players' hands.

data.flavor_text: "You don't know what you're tampering with."

data.name: Morph

abilities.name: Mimicry
abilities.text: You may play any character with Shift on this character as if this character had any name.

data.flavor_text:
"You jiggle-headed blob of mischief!"
—John Silver

data.name: Peter Pan

abilities.name: I Came to Listen to the Stories
abilities.text: Once per turn, when this character moves to a location, gain lore equal to that location's {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
The Illumineers needed someone to find a missing
spellbook, and Peter was the first to volunteer.

data.name: Prince John

abilities.name: Collect Taxes
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, each opponent with more lore than you loses 2 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Too late to be known as John the First, he's sure to
be known as John the Worst!"
—Sheriff of Nottingham

data.name: Robin Hood
data.flavor_text:
"Some days, it's nice to let the river do the
running."

data.name: Shenzi

abilities.name: I'll Handle This
abilities.text: While this character is at a location, she gets +3 {Strength}.

abilities.name: What's the Hurry?
abilities.text: While this character is at a location, whenever she challenges another character, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text: "Why not stick around for dinner?"

data.name: Sir Hiss

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text: Prince John isn't the only one collecting "taxes"!

data.name: Skippy

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: Even the bravest outlaw knows when to lie low.

data.name: Starkey
data.flavor_text: Point him in the right direction, and he'll do the rest.

data.name: Stitch

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Hide
abilities.text: While this character is at a location, he gains Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: For such a flashy dresser, he sure is hard to spot.

abilities.name: You'll Never Even Miss It
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a song card of your choice.

data.name: Ursula

abilities.name: What a Deal
abilities.text: Whenever this character sings a song, you may play that song again from your discard for free. If you do, put that card on the bottom of your deck instead of into your discard.

data.flavor_text: "I don't want much—just the most powerful lore!"

data.name: Wildcat

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Disassemble
abilities.text: {Exert} — Banish chosen item.

data.flavor_text: "I can take anything apart in under five minutes!"

data.name: Zazu

abilities.name: It's Time to Go!
abilities.text: While this character is at a location, he gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"I'd be lyin' if I said I ran the place, but welcome to
the Pride Lands all the same!"

data.name: Has Set My Heaaaaaaart...
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Banish chosen item.
data.flavor_text:
He's not real smart
And yet, he's touched my little cowhide heart

data.name: I Will Find My Way
rules: (A character with cost 1 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character of yours gets +2 {Strength} this turn. They may move to a location for free.
data.flavor_text:
I would go most anywhere
To feel like I belong

data.name: Strike a Good Match
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.
data.flavor_text:
Please bring honor to us
Please bring honor to us all

data.name: Airfoil

abilities.name: I Got to Be Going
abilities.text: {Exert} — If you've played 2 or more actions this turn, draw a card.

data.flavor_text: Discovered in the lost Sea Duck, it looked good as new.

data.name: Robin's Bow

abilities.name: Forest's Gift
abilities.text: {Exert} — Deal 1 damage to chosen damaged character or location.

abilities.name: A Bit of a Lark
abilities.text: Whenever a character of yours named Robin Hood quests, you may ready this item.

data.flavor_text:
"The forest always provides just what you need."
—Robin Hood

data.name: Starlight Vial

abilities.name: Efficient Energy
abilities.text: {Exert} — You pay 2 {Ink} less for the next action you play this turn.

abilities.name: Trap
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text: In the wrong hands, this vial of magic could be disastrous.

data.name: De Vil Manor
data.flavor_text:
"They say the ol' place is haunted, or bewitched, or some such fiddle-faddle."
—Colonel

data.name: Fang

abilities.name: Surrounded by Water
abilities.text: Characters gain Ward and Evasive while here. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge. Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.flavor_text: A nation protected by fierce assassins and their even fiercer cats.

data.name: Kuzco's Palace

abilities.name: City Walls
abilities.text: Whenever a character is challenged and banished while here, banish the challenging character.

data.flavor_text: "Sure it's a little small, but also it DOESN'T HAVE A POOL!" —Kuzco

data.name: Ariel

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Inspiring Voice
abilities.text: Whenever you play a song, chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text: Shipwrecks are great places to find lore—and hide from sharks!

data.name: Billy Bones
data.flavor_text:
"He's after me chest, that fiendish cyborg and his
band of cutthroats."

abilities.name: Nemesis
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.

abilities.name: Man-to-man
abilities.text: Characters named Peter Pan lose Evasive and can't gain Evasive.

data.name: Della Duck

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

data.flavor_text:
"I survived the moon. How tough could the flooded
Inklands be?"

data.name: HeiHei

abilities.name: Mindless Wandering
abilities.text: Once per turn, when this character moves to a location, each opponent loses 1 lore.

data.flavor_text: Considering the coconut.

data.name: Hydra

abilities.name: Watch the Teeth
abilities.text: Whenever this character is dealt damage, deal that much damage to chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text: More heads are better than one.

data.name: Jim Hawkins

abilities.name: This Is It!
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may play a location with cost 4 or less for free.

abilities.name: Take the Helm
abilities.text: Whenever you play a location, this character may move there for free.

data.flavor_text:
"You're gonna rattle the stars, you are."
—John Silver

data.name: Jim Hawkins
data.flavor_text:
If you want a bigger reward, you've got to take
bigger risks.

data.name: Kakamora

abilities.name: Plunder
abilities.text: When you play this character, each opponent loses 1 lore.

data.flavor_text: There's a bunch more where he came from.

data.name: Madame Medusa

abilities.name: That Terrible Woman
abilities.text: When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 3 {Strength} or less.

data.flavor_text:
"Finding lore will be as easy as taking candy from
children."

data.name: Maui

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

abilities.name: In Ma Belly
abilities.text: Whenever a character of yours named HeiHei quests, this character gets +1 {Lore} and loses Reckless this turn.

data.flavor_text: "You got any more of those chickens hanging around?"

data.name: Maui

abilities.name: This Mission Is Cursed
abilities.text: This character can't ready at the start of your turn.

abilities.name: I Got Your Back
abilities.text: {Exert} — Ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text: Always ready to make a splash.

data.name: Milo Thatch

abilities.name: I'm Your Man!
abilities.text: While this character is at a location, he gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text: "My grandpa never told me about this place!"

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Moana.)

abilities.name: Welcome to My Boat
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests while at a location, ready all other characters here. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.name: Moana

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text: No fire or storm will keep her from her goal.

data.name: Nutsy
data.flavor_text:
"Nutsy, button your beak."
—Trigger

data.name: Peter Pan

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: Over Here, Tink
abilities.text: While you have a character named Tinker Bell in play, this character gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
With Peter, plans often meant diving headlong into
danger.

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Peter Pan.)

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: You're Next!
abilities.text: Whenever he challenges a Pirate character, this character takes no damage from the challenge.

data.name: Prince Eric

abilities.name: Surprise Maneuver
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may banish chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
The storm came out of nowhere, forcing Eric
to turn back before he reached the mysterious
structure at the edge of Lorcana.

data.name: Scroop

abilities.name: Brute
abilities.text: While this character has damage, he gets +3 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
Always keep him in front of you. And downwind,
if possible.

data.name: Simba
data.flavor_text:
He'll join the hunt for lore after he's had a quick
snack.

data.name: Slightly

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: The Fox
abilities.text: If you have a character named Peter Pan in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

data.flavor_text: "Pirates sure are easy to trick!"

data.name: Stitch

keywords.name: Rush
keywords.text: (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

data.flavor_text:
"Who thought giving him power armor was a
good idea?!"
—Nani

data.name: Trigger

abilities.name: Old Betsy
abilities.text: Your characters named Nutsy get +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"Criminently, Trigger! Point that peashooter the
other way."
—Sheriff of Nottingham

data.name: Webby Vanderquack
data.flavor_text:
"Finding lore is a lot easier when you have a
grappling hook!"

data.name: Divebomb
rules: Banish one of your characters with Reckless to banish chosen character with less {Strength} than that character.

data.name: I've Got a Dream
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Ready chosen character of yours at a location. They can't quest for the rest of this turn. Gain lore equal to that location's {Lore}.
data.flavor_text:
Tor would like to quit and be a florist
Gunther does interior design

data.name: On Your Feet! Now!
rules: Ready all your characters and deal 1 damage to each of them. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.
data.flavor_text: "Catch them! Before they get away!"

data.name: Voyage
rules: Move up to 2 characters of yours to the same location for free.
data.flavor_text: "We were voyagers! Why'd we stop?" —Moana

abilities.name: It's Maui Time!
abilities.text: If you have a character named Maui in play, you may use this item's Shapeshift ability for free.

abilities.name: Shapeshift
abilities.text: {Exert} — Choose one: • Chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.) • Chosen character gets +3 {Strength} this turn.

data.name: Sumerian Talisman

abilities.name: Source of Magic
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever one of your characters is banished in a challenge, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"Summoned spirit from the dark
Show thyself before this arc."
—Lena Sabrewing

data.name: Agrabah
data.flavor_text:
"Welcome to Agrabah, city of mystery, of enchantment, and the finest
merchandise this side of the river."
—Merchant

abilities.name: Look Alive, You Swabs!
abilities.text: Characters gain Rush while here. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: All Hands on Deck!
abilities.text: Your Pirate characters may move here for free.

abilities.name: This Is Our Ship
abilities.text: Characters gain Evasive while here. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

abilities.name: Heave Together Now
abilities.text: If you have a character here, you pay 2 {Ink} less to move a character of yours here.

data.name: Audrey Ramirez

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Spare Parts
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, ready one of your items.

data.flavor_text: "How'd you break this thing, anyway?"

data.name: Captain Amelia

abilities.name: Discipline
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
"I've spotted a strange structure on the horizon.
Hard to port, helmsman!"

data.name: Dewey

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: "I got it! I knew I could do it! Dewey for the win!"

data.name: Flintheart Glomgold

abilities.name: They'll Never See It Coming!
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text: "Nobody tells Flintheart Glomgold what to do!"

data.name: Genie
data.flavor_text:
"Ten thousand years will give you such a crick in
the neck!"

data.name: Gramma Tala

abilities.name: There Was Only Ocean
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may put one into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.flavor_text:
Listen with your whole heart, and the ancestors will
guide you.

data.name: Gramma Tala

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Gramma Tala.)

abilities.name: Do You Know Who You Are?
abilities.text: Whenever a card is put into your inkwell, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
She will always be with you, no matter how far your
journey takes you.

data.name: Gyro Gearloose

abilities.name: Now Try to Keep Up
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put an item card from your discard on the top of your deck.

data.flavor_text: "Maybe the bulb tech will be less evil this time..."

data.name: Huey

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Three Nephews
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, if you have characters named Dewey and Louie in play, you may draw 3 cards.

data.flavor_text: "This looks like part of a larger crystal!"

data.name: King Louie
data.flavor_text:
"Hold up, cuz. Why not sit back and enjoy some
sweet beats?"

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Kit Cloudkicker.)

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.name: Kit Cloudkicker

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
Thrilled to have his airfoil back, he launched into
the Inklands.

data.name: Louie

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: "Found the last one!"

data.name: Maid Marian

abilities.name: Highborn Lady
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gets -2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text: She makes every space more beautiful.

data.name: Mama Odie

abilities.name: This Going to Be Good
abilities.text: Whenever you play a song, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: "You dig a little deeper, you'll find everything you need."

data.name: Pluto
data.flavor_text:
Pluto's job was to keep Gustav's attention so
Minnie could get to the cave.

data.name: Rufus

abilities.name: Too Old to Be Chasing Mice
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: "Faith is a bluebird you see from afar."

data.name: Scrooge McDuck

abilities.name: I'm Going Home!
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

abilities.name: I Didn't Get Rich by Being Stupid
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may play an item for free.

data.flavor_text: He can make money anywhere.

data.name: Scrooge McDuck

abilities.name: Treasure Finder
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next item you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
A strange new world is the perfect place to make a
strange new fortune!

data.name: The Queen

abilities.name: Calculating and Vain
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
data.flavor_text:
She has only one question, and she'd better like
the answer.

data.name: Tinker Bell

abilities.name: I Can Use That
abilities.text: Whenever one of your items is banished, you may put that card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: She lives in a world of possibilities.

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.name: Distract
rules: Chosen character gets -2 {Strength} this turn. Draw a card.

data.name: Friend Like Me
rules: (A character with cost 5 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Each player puts the top 3 cards of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.
data.flavor_text: You got some power in your corner now

data.name: How Far I'll Go
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: Repair
rules: Remove up to 3 damage from one of your locations or characters.
data.flavor_text:
"I'm thinkin' about opening a shop here. What do you
think?"

data.name: Aurelian Gyrosensor

abilities.name: Seeking Knowledge
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters quests, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text:
"It can point you toward lost lore, but if you're not careful,
it'll lead you off a cliff."
—Venturo, an Illumineer

data.name: Heart of Te Fiti

abilities.name: Create Life
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: It takes a pure heart to calm the raging storm within.

data.name: Lucky Dime

abilities.name: Number One
abilities.text: {Exert} — Choose a character of yours and gain lore equal to their {Lore}.

data.flavor_text: This one simple coin changed Scrooge's life forever.

data.name: Scrooge's Top Hat

abilities.name: Business Expertise
abilities.text: {Exert} — You pay 1 {Ink} less for the next item you play this turn.

data.flavor_text: Just the thing to top off another brilliant deal.

data.name: Vault Door

abilities.name: Sealed Away
abilities.text: Your locations and characters at locations gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
Only Scrooge knows about this vault. And he's going to
keep it that way.

data.name: Belle's House

abilities.name: Laboratory
abilities.text: If you have a character here, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play items.

data.flavor_text: Some of the most important tools in Lorcana are crafted here.

data.name: McDuck Manor
data.flavor_text:
"It's only the coolest home in Lorcana!"
—Webby Vanderquack

abilities.name: Reincarnation
abilities.text: Whenever a character is banished while here, you may put that card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: Chief Tui
data.flavor_text: "Look at our home! There is no better place to be."

data.name: Eeyore

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text: "Not much of a roadblock, but I suppose I'll do."

abilities.name: All Tied Up
abilities.text: This character enters play exerted and can't ready at the start of your turn.

abilities.name: Break Free
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever one of your other characters banishes another character in a challenge, you may ready this character.

data.name: Hades

abilities.name: Call the Titans
abilities.text: {Exert} — Ready your Titan characters.

data.flavor_text:
"Brothers! Titans! Look at you in your squalid prison.
Who put you down there?"

data.name: Helga Sinclair

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text: "That was an order, not a suggestion. Let's go!"

data.name: John Silver

abilities.name: Chart Your Own Course
abilities.text: For each location you have in play, this character gains Resist +1 and gets +1 {Lore}. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text: "I was never much good at games. Always hated to lose."

data.name: Kida

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text: She's seen strange things before, but nothing like this.

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Little John.)

abilities.name: Okay, Big Shot
abilities.text: While this character is exerted, your characters with Bodyguard gain Resist +1 and get +1 {Lore}. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.name: Lythos

keywords.name: Resist +2
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)

abilities.name: Stone Skin
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Resist +2 this turn.

data.flavor_text: "Crush Zeus!"

data.name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.name: Let's Take a Look
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Strength} for each location you have in play.

data.flavor_text:
Mickey knew just where to start searching for
the Sorcerer's Hat, but he didn't expect it to be
guarded.

abilities.name: Sound the Call
abilities.text: {Exert} — Play a character for free.

data.name: Minnie Mouse

abilities.name: Journey
abilities.text: While this character is at a location, she gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text: She'll never cave under pressure.

data.name: Mr. Smee

abilities.name: Oh Dear, Dear, Dear
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted and you don't have a Captain character in play, deal 1 damage to this character.

data.flavor_text: "Catch those little—OUCH!"

data.name: Mufasa
data.flavor_text: Even his name makes enemies quiver in fear.

data.name: Nala
data.flavor_text: "Pinned ya again."

data.name: Pyros

abilities.name: Eruption
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may ready chosen character.

data.flavor_text: "Melt Zeus!"

data.name: Razoul

abilities.name: Looky Here
abilities.text: While this character has no damage, he gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
"There's no princess here to save you this time,
street rat."

data.name: Robin Hood
data.flavor_text:
"You call this an ambush? Tsk, tsk. It's barely a
bushwhack."

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Robin Hood.)

abilities.name: Skilled Combatant
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, gain 2 lore.

abilities.name: The Good of Others
abilities.text: When this character is banished in a challenge, you may draw a card.

data.name: Sheriff of Nottingham

abilities.name: Taxes Should Hurt
abilities.text: Whenever you discard a card, you may deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text:
The thirteenth Rule of Villainy: Take everything you
can, but do it with a smile.

data.name: Simba

abilities.name: Step Down or Fight
abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever he banishes another character in a challenge during your turn, you may choose one: • Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard 2 cards. • Deal 2 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text: He's ready to restore the Pride Lands to their former glory.

data.name: Simba

abilities.name: Triumphant Stance
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, chosen opposing character can't challenge during their next turn.

data.flavor_text:
With dangers multiplying all around, the pride needs
its guardian.

data.name: Thaddeus E. Klang

abilities.name: My Teeth Are Sharper
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests while at a location, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text: "Soon the bells will ring in the sound of your doom!"

data.name: And Then Along Came Zeus
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Deal 5 damage to chosen character or location.
data.flavor_text:
He hurled his thunderbolt—He zapped
Locked those suckers in a vault—They're trapped
And on his own stopped chaos in its tracks

data.name: Ba-Boom!
rules: Deal 2 damage to chosen character or location.
data.flavor_text: Bigger than your average boom!

data.name: Olympus Would Be That Way
rules: Your characters get +3 {Strength} while challenging a location this turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Now that I set you free, what is the first thing you are
going to do?"
—Hades

data.name: Rise of the Titans
rules: Banish chosen location or item.
data.flavor_text:
"Oh, we're in trouble, big trouble!"
—Hermes

abilities.name: Get Those Scurvy Brats!
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever one of your characters banishes another character in a challenge, you may pay 1 {Ink} to draw a card.

abilities.name: Let's Have at It!
abilities.text: Your characters named Captain Hook gain Challenger +1. (They get +1 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.name: Gizmosuit

abilities.name: Cybernetic Armor
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

data.flavor_text:
It stands in the Hall of Lorcana, waiting for someone to
speak the secret words.

data.name: Map of Treasure Planet

abilities.name: Key to the Portal
abilities.text: {Exert} — You pay 1 {Ink} less for the next location you play this turn.

abilities.name: Show the Way
abilities.text: You pay 1 {Ink} less to move your characters to a location.

data.flavor_text:
"Gentlemen, this must be kept under lock and key."
—Captain Amelia

data.name: Maui's Place of Exile

abilities.name: Isolated
abilities.text: Characters gain Resist +1 while here. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text: Nothing but boulders and sand—easy to miss.

data.name: Nottingham
data.flavor_text:
Sir Hiss: "I say, sire, your mother's castle will be the perfect place to set up our scheme!"
Prince John: "Mommy!"

data.name: The Bayou

abilities.name: Show Me the Way
abilities.text: Whenever a character quests while here, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text: A place to find what you need, not just what you want.

abilities.name: The Power of Evil
abilities.text: For each character card in your discard, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

abilities.name: Summon the Spirits
abilities.text: When you play this character, shuffle all character cards from your discard into your deck.
